DISCOVERY 301, PLAINTIFF EDUARDO SOBALVARRO'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANT ERIC LEFEAT AND THEIR COUNSEL. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. NO LATER THAN JANUARY 30, 2025 MR. LEFEAT SHALL PROVIDE VERIFIED FURTHER RESPONSES TO THE INTERROGATORIES THAT ARE THE SUBJECT OF THIS MOTION. IF, AS MAY BE THE CASE, MR. LEFEAT HAS NO FURTHER SUBSTANTIVE INFORMATION AS TO THESE INTERROGATORIES, HE MAY RESPOND THAT HE IS NOT WITHHOLDING ANY SUBSTANTIVE INFORMATION BASED ON HIS OBJECTIONS. IF, HOWEVER, HE HAS FURTHER SUBSTANTIVE INFORMATION, HE MUST PROVIDE IT. SINCE BOTH SIDES ACTED WITH SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION, NO MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED
